mapper.update: create table if not exists sys_permission ( id bigint primary key, permission_code varchar(128) not null unique, permission_name varchar(128) not null, permission_type varchar(32) not null, module_code varchar(64) not null, action_code varchar(64) not null, menu_id bigint null, sensitive_flag tinyint default 0, sort_no int not null, status tinyint not null, create_time timestamp not null, update_time timestamp not null )
alter table sys_permission add column sensitive_flag tinyint default 0
create table if not exists sys_role_permission ( id bigint primary key, role_id bigint not null, permission_id bigint not null, unique (role_id, permission_id) )

create table if not exists sys_user_permission ( id bigint primary key, user_id bigint not null, permission_id bigint not null, grant_type varchar(16) not null, create_time timestamp not null, update_time timestamp not null, unique (user_id, permission_id) )
mapper.select: select id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_path, permission_code, sort_no from sys_menu where status = 1 order by sort_no, id
select menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId} order by menu_id

select id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, module_code, action_code, menu_id, coalesce(sensitive_flag, 0) as sensitive_flag, sort_no from sys_permission where status = 1 order by sort_no, id
select permission_id from sys_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId} order by permission_id
select p.permission_code from sys_role_permission rp join sys_permission p on p.id = rp.permission_id where rp.role_id = #{roleId} and p.status = 1 order by p.sort_no, p.id

select p.permission_code as permissionCode, up.grant_type as grantType from sys_user_permission up join sys_permission p on p.id = up.permission_id where up.user_id = #{userId} and p.status = 1 order by p.sort_no, p.id
select id from sys_role order by id
select id, role_code as roleCode, role_name as roleName from sys_role order by id
select count(1) from sys_menu where id = #{menuId} and status = 1
select id from sys_menu where menu_path = #{menuPath} order by id limit 1
select count(1) from sys_permission where id = #{permissionId} and status = 1
select count(1) from sys_menu where menu_path = '/system/permissions'
select id from sys_menu where menu_path = '/system' order by id limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_menu (id, role_id, menu_id) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{menuId})

insert into sys_permission ( id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, module_code, action_code, menu_id, sensitive_flag, sort_no, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{id}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{moduleCode}, #{actionCode}, #{menuId}, coalesce(#{sensitiveFlag}, 0), #{sortNo}, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update sys_permission set permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, module_code = #{moduleCode}, action_code = #{actionCode}, menu_id = #{menuId}, sensitive_flag = coalesce(#{sensitiveFlag}, 0), sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = 1, update_time = current_timestamp where permission_code = #{permissionCode}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_permission (id, role_id, permission_id) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{permissionId})
insert into sys_user_permission (id, user_id, permission_id, grant_type, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{permissionId}, #{grantType}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
